name: Automated Employee Payroll Employee Request System

parameters.formTitle: Hurayra Teq Consulting Limited Direct Deposit Authorization Form
parameters.formDescription:
At Hurayra Teq Consulting Limited we require our employees to set up automatic deposit into 
their checking and/or savings accounts.  It is possible to have multiple accounts 
set up at one time.  To set up or change direct deposit information please completely fill out necessary details on this form

values.formSubmittedText: Your request has been received and being reviewed

parameters.subject: =Approval Required - Payroll Change - ID:{{ $('CREATE REQUEST').item.json['Employee ID #'] }}
Action Required - Invalid Information (Payroll direct deposit change)
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Employee Full Name'] }}, 

We couldn't process your request at this time.
Please verify your details and try again.
Thank you

parameters.subject: Pending Request Available
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('Validate Info').item.json['Employee Full Name'] }},

You already have a pending request. Please wait for approval.

Regards

parameters.subject: Direct Deposit Change Request Received
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('Validate Info').item.json['Employee Full Name'] }},  

Your request to update your direct deposit details has been successfully received and is currently under review. 

Reference ID: {{ $('LOG REQUEST CREATED').item.json['Request ID'] }}

Our HR team has been notified, and your request is being processed for approval. You’ll be informed as soon as a decision has been made.  
If any additional details are needed, we’ll reach out to you directly.  

Thanks for your patience.  

Best regards, 
HR Team Hurayra Teq Consulting Limited

parameters.subject: Direct depost Information Change Approval
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('Get request').item.json['Employee Name '] }},

Your request to update your direct deposit details has been approved and successfully processed.
Reference ID: {{ $('Get request').item.json['Request ID'] }}

The changes will take effect in the upcoming payroll cycle.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
HR Team
Hurayra Teq Consulting Limited

parameters.subject: Direct Deposit Change Request Update
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('Get request').item.json['Employee Name '] }},
Your request to update your direct deposit details has been reviewed, but it was not approved at this time.  
Reference ID: {{ $('Get request').item.json['Request ID'] }}

This may be due to missing or incorrect information. Kindly review your submission and resubmit your request with the correct details.  

If you need any clarification, feel free to reach out.  

Best regards, 
HR Team Hurayra Teq Consulting Limited

parameters.subject: Request Already Processed

parameters.responseBody:
✅ Request Approved

The payroll update has been successfully approved.

You can now close this page.

❌ Request Rejected

The payroll update request has been reviewed and rejected.

You can close this page.

⚠️ Request Already Processed

This request has already been reviewed.

No further action is required.
